batch_summary.note: Mar-Apr 2025. S-013: Olivia skateboards at Melissa's without safety gear, falls and injures leg (Mar 13, 2025). Eli notes safety gear absence. Melissa dismisses: 'When she first started learning. She's been doing skateboard fit forever.' Medical attention sought (urgent care). Eli's concern per ADD-004 pattern (safety compliance failures at Melissa's). ARC-RF14-002 signal 6.

primary_flags.type: Safety compliance — inadequate protective equipment at Melissa's
primary_flags.description: ROW-12024 [Received]: 'Olivia says her right leg is hurting from where she fell on the skateboard yesterday.' ROW-12026: 'Her lil hand needs looked at today' [different message context]. ROW-12034 [Sent]: 'Well, that's what I suspected. Surprised she wasn't wearing any pads or safety gear, though — I thought that was something we both agreed on being important.' Melissa's response (ROW-12036): 'When she first started learning. She's been doing skateboard fit forever.' Dismissed: 'Pads wouldn't have helped anyways' (ROW-12038). Eli documents failure to provide safety gear for Olivia's skateboarding at Melissa's; Melissa dismisses the concern. Pulled calf muscles confirmed; urgent care attendance per Melissa.

arc_updates.event: RF14-S-013: No safety gear + injury at Melissa's household. Signal count now 6. Expanding pattern of safety compliance failures at Melissa's. ACTIVE maintained.
